sha.name: Sofitel Bangkok Sukhumvit
sha.detail: Located on the bustling Sukhumvit road in the heart of Bangkok city, luxury hotel Sofitel Bangkok Sukhumvit is a popular choice among travellers who are looking for a luxurious stay in close proximity to shopping malls, BTS Skytrain and MRT stations and entertainment centres. Sofitel Bangkok Sukhumvit effortlessly blends traditional Thai hospitality with classic French flair and service, offering guests a unique opportunity to experience the best of Bangkok city.This 5-star Bangkok hotel, recently launched its own skywalk bridge that connects the hotel directly to the nearby BTS Asoke & MRT Sukhumvit and the trendy shopping Mall Terminal 21, guests can now walk-through hassle-free. Sofitel Bangkok Sukhumvit offers 345 luxury rooms & suites, four onsite restaurants and bars including Belga, one of the best rooftop bars in Bangkok, over 702 sqm of event space with state of the art conferencing facilities, holistic wellness treatments at the award-winning luxury Le Spa with L’Occitane and SoFit gym, making it the ideal choice for anyone travelling for business or leisure.Designed to reflect the cultural heritage of Thailand & France, a walk around this art-deco inspired hotel will delight travellers with inspiring artworks portraying everyday life and iconic attractions.

Sixt Operates in 110 Countries from over 2,500 locations globally and is the No.1 Car Rental Company in Germany, Austria, Switzerland, Ukraine, Croatia and many countries. Sixt Rent a Car offers great vehicle at low rates all over the world. Get a great deal on your car rental now or Limousine Service. Save on your next rental car with Sixt and Make a Car rental reservation with Nationwide 13 Stations Website: www.sixtthailand.comCall Center: 1798

data.name: Silpakorn University Sanamchandra Palace Campus
data.introduction: Silpakorn University has a long history which can be traced back to its establishment in 1933. In 1968, the Faculty of Arts was commissioned at Sanamchandra Palace Campus by Mom Luang Pin Malakul. The campus has a lot of trees, a pond, and a beautiful bridge suitable for leisure activities. There are also the monuments of Professor Silp Pherasee and Professor Mom Luang Pin Malakul which are worthy of praise.

sha.name: Sea Dance Resort
sha.detail: Sea Dance Resort offers unique and peaceful of separate villa/bungalow. which we have a total of 28 villas. We offer a private beach, outdoor pool & kids pool, massage, and beach activities to help you unwind after an action-packed day in the city. We locate in Cheongmon area which takes 15-20 minutes to drive to Chaweng and Fisherman Village. And take only 10-minute drive from Samui airport and approximately 40 minutes from Nathon Pier.
